JSyn      ----     Java Audio Synthesis API

Signal Passed Between Units

  • Signal "type" controls conversion in set() method.
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_FULL_RANGE
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_HALF_LIFE
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_SVF_FREQ
  • Set signal type for a port on an adder that is connected to a StateVariableFilter frequency.
myAdder.inputB.setSignalType( Synth.SIGNAL_TYPE_SVF_FREQ );
myAdder.inputB.set( 800.0 );
 [TOP]  [PREVIOUS]  [NEXT]

Visit the JSyn or SoftSynth home pages.
